narrative:
Blue Ash City has 10,747 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
